name: skin-win98
title: Windows 98 skin
description: Windows 98 concept skin: classic grey 4-edge 3D bevels, navy title gradients, teal desktop. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="win98"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/win98.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="win98" on <html>.
